title: MariaDB to acquire GridGain to close the AI latency gap
summary: Popular open source database provider MariaDB enters into an agreement to acquire in-memory computing specialist GridGain to meet the sub-millisecond data demands of agentic AI.

title: CrowdStrike: Companies give AI agents keys to the kingdom. That's a security disaster.
summary: Implement AI in haste, repent at leisure, said Chris Stewart, CrowdStrike VP of technology and cloud ecosystem.

title: Opinion: My cunning plan to solve America’s AI computing shortage
summary: When hyperscalers replace GPUs in their training clusters, those chips—and the HBM attached to them—should be systematically redeployed into the network edge.

title: T-Mobile CEO shoots down the prospect of an MVNO with Starlink
summary: “Our philosophy on MVNOs is really clear. We get into an MVNO when we think there's an incremental TAM to go after," T-Mobile CEO Srini Gopalan said.

title: MWC 2026: Rakuten Symphony built an OSS to manage coverage, more via satellite
summary: Prompted by sister company Rakuten Mobile working with AST SpaceMobile on a forthcoming D2D system, Rakuten Symphony has made an OSS for managing the ground coverage and more from satellites in space.

title: Accenture: 79% of telcos still at Level 0/1 network automation
summary: Most telco networks today remain “fairly manual,” with limited automation — and just 22% expect to reach Level 4 by 2030, said Accenture’s Tejas Rao.

title: MWC 2026: US outspends Europe on wireless, CTIA says
summary: CTIA’s latest report highlights a stark investment divide, with U.S. wireless spending more than 2.5 times higher than Europe’s.
